name: Rich and Creamy Refried Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the refried beans and sour cream, blending thoroughly.
2. Add all of the other ingredients except the garnish, blending well.
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator.
4. Garnish with shredded sharp cheddar cheese just before serving.
5. Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip.
6. Suggested dippers: Cucumber, Cheese Crackers, Jicama, Broccoli
